title: Scalar questions (numeric, date, rating, boolean)
description: Answers that land in the polymorphic value columns instead of via an option_key. rating and boolean go to value_numeric (boolean as 1/0); numeric and date are a text question with a numeric/date inputType, going to value_numeric / value_date. None of these touch the PII store — a number, a date, or a rating is not identifying free text.

elements.name: satisfaction
elements.title: How satisfied are you, 1 to 5?
elements.description: A rating resolves to value_numeric (the chosen rate value). Numeric rate values only — a text-valued rating ('Low'/'High') is rejected at publish for now.

elements.name: would_recommend
elements.title: Would you recommend us?
elements.description: A boolean resolves to value_numeric as 1 (true) or 0 (false), so AVG(value_numeric) reads as the proportion answering yes. Custom valueTrue/valueFalse are not supported.

elements.name: age
elements.title: How old are you?
elements.description: A text question with inputType 'number' routes to value_numeric instead of value_text — it is a scalar number, not free text, so it never enters the PII store.

elements.name: started_on
elements.title: When did you start?
elements.description: A text question with inputType 'date' routes to value_date (parsed from a YYYY-MM-DD answer).
